health_conditions: complete rupture of distal bicep tendon (surgically repaired)

benefits.description: 8 months post complete distal bicep tendon rupture and surgical repair, injured arm is as strong as the other, no pain, symmetrical size; only minor fatigue noted sooner than uninjured arm

protocol_notes: Was on retatrutide continuously through complete distal bicep tendon rupture (end of May 2025), surgical repair (~2 weeks later), and 12 weeks of PT. Anecdotal report shared as counter-evidence that retatrutide does not hinder soft tissue recovery.
